mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM seckill_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FIRING', 'QUEUED') LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM seckill_reservation WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND (trigger_at IS NULL OR trigger_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY trigger_at ASC NULLS FIRST, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'FIRING', fired_at = NOW(), version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND version = #{version}
UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'QUEUED', request_id = #{requestId}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'FIRING' AND version = #{version}

UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'FAILED', fail_code = #{failCode}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FIRING', 'QUEUED') AND version = #{version}
UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'SUCCESS', order_id = #{orderId}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('FIRING', 'QUEUED') AND version = #{version}
UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'CANCELLED', version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'EXPIRED', fail_reason = '活动已结束仍未触发', version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE seckill_reservation SET retry_count = COALESCE(retry_count, 0) + 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'PENDING', version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'FIRING' AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_reservation WHERE status = 'QUEUED' AND request_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY update_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'SUCCESS', order_id = #{orderId}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status IN ('FIRING', 'QUEUED')

UPDATE seckill_reservation SET status = 'FAILED', fail_code = COALESCE(fail_code, 50000), fail_reason = #{failReason}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status IN ('FIRING', 'QUEUED')
